services.name: pub.eda:send
services.description: WmPublic. Sends events to a streaming provider using an event specification. Replaces the deprecated pub.streaming:send service.

input_parameters.name: connectionAliasName
input_parameters.description: String. Optional. Name of the streaming connection alias to use to send events. Specify the fully qualified name in the format namespace:name (for example, prod.streaming:kafka-main). The streaming connection alias identifies the streaming provider to which the service sends events. The specified connectionAliasName must be used by the specified eventSpecificationName. If the event specification defines a connection alias, the specified connectionAliasName must match it. If the event specification does not define a connection alias, the connectionAliasName provided here will be used. At least one source (event specification or input parameter) must provide the connection alias.

input_parameters.name: eventSpecificationName
input_parameters.description: String. Name of the event specification that defines the structure of the event, and indicates how to encode and decode event data. Specify the fully qualified name in the format namespace:name (for example, prod.events:order-created). The event specification may optionally define a connection alias and destination. For information about creating event specifications, see Event Specifications .

input_parameters.name: destinationName
input_parameters.description: String. Optional. The name of the destination to which events are sent. If specified, this value overrides any destination defined in the event specification. If not specified and the event specification does not define a destination, the service fails.

input_parameters.name: destinationType
input_parameters.description: String. Optional. The type of destination: "TOPIC" or "QUEUE". Required if destinationName is specified and the event specification does not define a destination type. If not specified, defaults to "TOPIC" for backward compatibility.

input_parameters.name: events
input_parameters.description: Document List Document (IData object) A document list of the events to send to the streaming provider.

input_parameters.name: header
input_parameters.description: Document Optional. Metadata about the event.

input_parameters.name: timestamp
input_parameters.description: String Optional. Timestamp to assign to the event. If timestamp value is not specified, at execution time, the streaming provider populates timestamp with the current clock time.

input_parameters.name: key
input_parameters.description: Object Optional. The event key. The provided key must match the key data type set in the event specification.

input_parameters.name: value
input_parameters.description: Object Optional. The event value. The provided value must match the value data type set in the event specification.
